scripts.clean: rm -rf node_modules dist dist-test yarn.lock package-lock.json
scripts.reset: npm run clean && npm i && npm run build && npm test
scripts.repo-tag: REPO_VERSION=`node -e "console.log(require('./package').version)"` && echo TAG: v$REPO_VERSION && git commit -a -m v$REPO_VERSION && git push && git tag v$REPO_VERSION && git push --tags;
scripts.repo-tag-dry: REPO_VERSION=`node -e "console.log(require('./package').version)"` && echo "[dry-run] TAG: v$REPO_VERSION" && if git rev-parse -q --verify refs/tags/v$REPO_VERSION >/dev/null; then echo "[dry-run] WARNING: tag v$REPO_VERSION already exists - bump the version first"; else echo "[dry-run] would commit -a, push, tag v$REPO_VERSION and push --tags; nothing done"; fi && git status --short
scripts.repo-publish: npm run clean && npm i && npm run repo-publish-quick
scripts.repo-publish-dry: npm run clean && npm i && npm run repo-publish-quick-dry
scripts.repo-publish-quick: npm run build && npm run test && npm publish --registry https://registry.npmjs.org --access=public
scripts.repo-publish-quick-dry: npm run build && npm run test && ( npm publish --dry-run --registry https://registry.npmjs.org --access=public || echo "[dry-run] npm publish refused (see npm error above) - usually the version is already published; bump package.json before a real release" )
scripts.repo-release: npm run repo-publish && npm run repo-tag
scripts.repo-release-dry: npm run repo-publish-quick-dry && npm run repo-tag-dry
